title: Project Telos Updated Tooling And Outreach Handoff

claims.text: The Telos current catalog and manifest record a 70-tool five-flagship surface after the updated-tool pass.
claims.falsification: Catalog or manifest summary reports a different current expected/available tool count.

claims.text: The updated tool-shape assessment document exists and distinguishes installed CLI surfaces from local repo surfaces.
claims.falsification: The assessment document is missing or conflates repo availability with installed PATH availability.

claims.text: The outreach handoff package includes demo packages, audience outreach briefs, a visibility content queue, and a parallel Codex handoff.
claims.falsification: Any required handoff document is missing.

claims.text: The handoff package preserves current limitations for Learn, BuildLang/buildc, Emet, and Build Universe.
claims.falsification: The handoff package promotes Learn, BuildLang/buildc, Emet, or Build Universe beyond the locally verified evidence.

claims.text: Targeted Telos tests pass for MCP launch parity, operator scripts, rendering research, current-state docs, and the Telos MCP surface.
claims.falsification: The targeted Node test slice fails.
